context_for_next_testing_agent: All features working correctly. The useFocusEffect fix resolved the critical navigation crash. Bookings tab, chat feature, and all navigation flows are fully functional. Test user testui73155/quest123 has active booking with chat history for future testing if needed.
rca_of_issue:
ISSUE RESOLVED

PREVIOUS ISSUE (iteration_3):
BookingsScreen was using useFocusEffect from '@react-navigation/native' which caused crash because Expo Router uses a different navigation system.

FIX APPLIED:
Changed import on line 6 of /app/frontend/app/(tabs)/bookings.tsx from:
  import { useFocusEffect } from '@react-navigation/native'
To:
  import { useRouter, useFocusEffect } from 'expo-router'

VERIFICATION:
✅ Bookings tab loads without crash
✅ useFocusEffect hook works correctly with Expo Router
✅ Tab navigation functions properly
✅ All booking features operational
✅ Chat feature fully functional

The fix is complete and verified through comprehensive UI testing.
